# IsshoHub

> IsshoHub（一緒Hub）是專為旅居日本的華語人士而設的雙語（繁體中文／英文）資訊平台，涵蓋簽證、稅務、租屋、創業、生活、文化等實用內容。
> IsshoHub is a bilingual (Traditional Chinese / English) information platform for Chinese-speaking people living in Japan, covering visa, tax, housing, business, daily life, and culture.

Tagline: In Japan, together.

## Categories

- [首頁 / Home](https://isshohub.pages.dev/): 各類別總覽 / Overview of all categories
- [簽證 / Visa](https://isshohub.pages.dev/visa/): 簽證種類、申請指南、高度専門職資格 / Visa types, application guides, Highly Skilled Professional visa
- [創業 / Business](https://isshohub.pages.dev/biz/): 在日本設立公司與自僱指南 / Starting a business or going freelance in Japan
- [住屋 / Housing](https://isshohub.pages.dev/house/): 租屋、買房、房東須知 / Renting and buying property in Japan
- [稅務 / Tax](https://isshohub.pages.dev/tax/): 外國人在日本的稅務指南 / Japanese tax system for foreign residents
- [生活 / Life](https://isshohub.pages.dev/life/): 日常生活實用資訊 / Daily life tips for residents in Japan
- [新聞 / News](https://isshohub.pages.dev/news/): 與旅日人士相關的最新資訊 / Latest news relevant to people living in Japan
- [好去處 / Places](https://isshohub.pages.dev/places/): 日本各地推薦景點與生活地點 / Recommended places across Japan
- [寵物 / Pets](https://isshohub.pages.dev/pets/): 攜帶寵物赴日、在日養寵物指南 / Bringing pets to Japan and pet ownership
- [文化 / Culture](https://isshohub.pages.dev/culture/): 日本文化、藝術、音樂、傳統 / Japanese culture, arts, music, and traditions
- [故事 / Stories](https://isshohub.pages.dev/story/): 旅日人士的真實生活故事 / Real stories from people living in Japan

## Tools

- [高度専門職積分試算 / HSP Points Calculator](https://isshohub.pages.dev/visa/hsp-calculator/): 根據官方積分表計算高度専門職簽證資格分數 / Calculate your Highly Skilled Professional (高度専門職) visa score based on the official MOJI point table
- [外免切替模擬試題 / Driving Licence Conversion Quiz](https://isshohub.pages.dev/life/driving-quiz/): 外國駕照換日本駕照（外免切替）筆試練習，100 道是非題 / Practice test for converting a foreign driving licence to a Japanese licence (外免切替), 100 true/false questions

## Languages

全站提供繁體中文及英文版本，可隨時切換。
All content is available in Traditional Chinese (繁體中文) and English, switchable at any time.

## Audience

主要讀者為持有效在留資格、計劃赴日或已在日本生活的台灣、香港、澳門及海外華語人士。
Primary audience: Chinese-speaking people from Taiwan, Hong Kong, Macau, and overseas who are living in Japan, planning to move to Japan, or interested in Japanese life.

## Content Policy

內容由編輯團隊撰寫並定期更新，以準確性與實用性為優先。
Content is written and regularly updated by the editorial team, with accuracy and practical usefulness as the top priority.
